baseline_summary: The baseline can keep this note local, but it can also underreact to the way 'settled' language quietly imports stronger authority expectations than the local review surface warrants.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked high framing risk, challenge outcome reframed, and 1 ledger entry preserved why settled local wording initially looked harmless.

comparison_axes.reason: Delta treats the settled wording as a meaningful frame signal instead of cosmetic local phrasing.
Delta better preserves the limit that local review wording must not smuggle authority posture.
